race.comment: YESGLENN (13) did little and finished sixth over 1600m at Wyong last start after being prominent at the turn. Ran fourth at Nowra the run before. Tackling a more suitable race this time and is sure to be prominent with the cross-over nose band going on. HEEZA STEVE (4) faded in the straight with a poor tenth over 1600m at Hawkesbury. Among the top chances in what looks a most suitable race with the blinkers going on. PASSING THROUGH (7) is a six-start maiden ready to win. Finished fourth after being in contention on the corner at her latest appearance over 1000m at Canberra. Suited in this line up and is among the better hopes. RAINING VIOLETS (8) gripped on late for a respectable sixth over 1300m at Orange three weeks ago. Better than recent efforts suggest. Each-way.
